payload.answer: Do not commit memory for a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event.

entity_resolution.reason: Input describes the same Slack event ID delivered twice; this is a retry/duplicate signal rather than new stable memory content.

details: Detected duplicate delivery for Fixture ID slack_retry_event_001; committing would risk redundant/duplicated memory.

repair_options: If a new fact is desired, require a non-duplicate event ID or confirm the message content is new beyond retries.
